cases.name: gold
cases.diff:
diff --git a/lru/__init__.py b/lru/__init__.py
index 5d8fc5d..ccf03cf 100644
--- a/lru/__init__.py
+++ b/lru/__init__.py
@@ -15,3 +15,9 @@ class LRU:
         self._d[key] = value
         if len(self._d) > self.capacity:
             self._d.popitem(last=False)
+
+    def get(self, key):
+        if key not in self._d:
+            return None
+        self._d.move_to_end(key)
+        return self._d[key]

cases.name: no_touch
cases.diff:
diff --git a/lru/__init__.py b/lru/__init__.py
index 5d8fc5d..2a56966 100644
--- a/lru/__init__.py
+++ b/lru/__init__.py
@@ -15,3 +15,6 @@ class LRU:
         self._d[key] = value
         if len(self._d) > self.capacity:
             self._d.popitem(last=False)
+
+    def get(self, key):
+        return self._d.get(key)

cases.name: touch_wrong_end
cases.diff:
diff --git a/lru/__init__.py b/lru/__init__.py
index 5d8fc5d..572bb23 100644
--- a/lru/__init__.py
+++ b/lru/__init__.py
@@ -15,3 +15,9 @@ class LRU:
         self._d[key] = value
         if len(self._d) > self.capacity:
             self._d.popitem(last=False)
+
+    def get(self, key):
+        if key not in self._d:
+            return None
+        self._d.move_to_end(key, last=False)
+        return self._d[key]
